relevant_posts.snippet: Nextdoor Manalapan - Freehold Rd  My husband and I received an email from Concordia customer care stating that we need to pay $500 for DRYER VENT VIOLATION. https://nextdoor.com/p/G_4SxgtdG_R2?post=469475715&ct=8QByTKlaJRR5_Q5TNSByZPOO1xV0WHgMv5PVpm-32VEtQN7pCQ_NXzJpsR5Imdzr&ec=OWKiQRDj9vEHAYwTV6YMARldwuFdgGkeefhwfGYAE0s=&token=S2vuBWTMmiaU2xzkj6kevdp7BMU0eSaXcJWldsE8latolM-Od6EWksdv8S2RrVQFxzMpTzPaZ43E4S-oMmJ8QCzUBOByBpuS-Dd1kLni8zE%3D&auto_token=WrTLRfknD3_i6IvZqaU__-6z4w4FhZTzzhRAZTgd3OfyP
